name: All Grade Mining, Inc.
summary: All Grade Mining, Inc., a development stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mining properties in the Republic of Chile. Its primary asset is the Salitrosa iron ore mine that consists of 23 concessions covering an area of 741 hectares located in the Atacama Region, Cha√É¬±aral Province. The company was formerly known as Hybred International, Inc. and changed its name to All Grade Mining, Inc. in November 2011. All Grade Mining, Inc. is based in Hackensack, New Jersey.
